title: helichrysum antennaria
intro: Helichrysum antennaria, also known as Mountain Everlast, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to the mountainous regions of Europe, Africa, and Asia. It is a member of the daisy family and is prized for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a popular medicinal herb. The plant's medicinal properties have been shown to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate pain, making it a potential natural remedy for various health issues. Helichrysum antennaria can be prepared in various herbal forms, including essential oil, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to support cardiovascular health, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote overall well-being.
